VAL-DASH-001.notes: Total value correctly sums all items (laptop $1200 + phone $800 + backpack $100 = $2100)

VAL-DASH-002.notes: Protected value correctly sums covered items only (laptop + phone = $2000)

VAL-DASH-003.notes: Unprotected value is prominently displayed ($100 with red indicator)

VAL-DASH-005.notes: Empty state shows $0 and helpful message when no items

VAL-DASH-006.notes: Values update when items appear/disappear verified in unit tests

VAL-DASH-007.notes: Values update immediately on policy switch

VAL-DASH-008.notes: No Insurance shows $0 protected and 100% gap

VAL-DASH-009.notes: Recommendations shown for uncovered items verified in unit tests

VAL-DASH-010.notes: Positive message when all covered verified in unit tests

VAL-DASH-011.notes: Tab switching preserves all state (items, totals, policy)

VAL-DASH-012.notes: Per-item breakdown list visible with status indicators

VAL-DASH-013.notes: Rapid changes handled gracefully verified in unit tests
